name: Finance
descriptionTemplate: When the economic output of the city where the troops are stationed is at least 100 (or if the general has the skills Unyielding or Military Supply Coordination, the threshold is reduced to 70), the per-turn economic income increases by X.

progression.renderedDesc: When the economic output of the city where the troops are stationed is at least 100 (or if the general has the skills Unyielding or Military Supply Coordination, the threshold is reduced to 70), the per-turn economic income increases by 8.

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Finance » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Lorsque economic output of the city where the troops sont stationed is at least 100 (or if the general has the skills Unyielding or Military Supply Coordination, the threshold is réduit to 70), the per-tour economic income augmente by 40. ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Finance" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When the economic output of the city where the troops are stationed is at least 100 (or if the general has the skills Unyielding or Military Supply Coordination, the threshold is reduced to 70), the per-turn economic income increases by 40.". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Finance“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When the economic output of the city where the troops are stationed is at least 100 (or if the general has the skills Unyielding or Military Supply Coordination, the threshold is reduced to 70), the per-turn economic income increases by 40.“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
